step_rationale: Sphingoid base precursor; PM-induced atherosclerosis mediator with pro-inflammatory and oxidative properties.
mechanism: Sphinganine, a sphingoid base precursor, accumulates in response to environmental particulate matter and mediates oxidative inflammation driving atherosclerosis progression.

references.title: Ambient Air Pollution and Atherosclerosis: A Potential Mediating Role of Sphingolipids.
